title: Paramphibambusa bambusicola and new species in Cainiaceae from Yunnan, China
author: Han, Li-Su
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Figure 3 Arecophila xishuangbannaensis (GMB-W1283, holotype) a bamboo specimen b, c appearance of ostioles on host surface d–f vertical sections of ascomata g peridium h paraphyses i–m asci n asci with J+, wedge-shaped rings (Stained in Melzer's reagent) o–t ascospores (s showing ascospore with longitudinal striations t ascospore stained in Indian ink showing mucilaginous sheath). Scale bars: 300 μm (d–f); 20 μm (g); 30 μm (h); 50 μm (i–m); 15 μm (n–t).
